top_signals.title: Private Credit’s Unthinkable Becomes Reality as Trading Revs Up
top_signals.summary: Private credit managers are increasingly turning to the once-unthinkable: Trading in and out of loans to dump troubled assets and hunt for bargains amid the industry’s first stress test after years of breakneck growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
